title: i want to be able to represent dependencies in the cards detailed and overview views
description: please use the built in dependencies system in bd (beads) to store those dependencies but the user should be able to manage this while creating or editing a ticket (blocked by, blocking x, etc.)

comments.author: madda
comments.text: Done: blocked-by/blocking deps in create/edit and shown on cards + detail.

title: i want the user to be able to edit the titles of tickets. they can't right now

comments.author: madda
comments.text: Done: ticket titles are editable in the detail dialog and saved via bd update --title.

title: auto gen title
description:
i want to switch the ticket creation up so i just need to write the prompt itself and not need to come up with a title

the title should be auto generated if left empty

when we create a ticket the placeholder in the title should say it's auto generated 

(use the flow that we use to generate title for session to do this)

and we should focus on the prompt field by default not the title field

comments.author: madda
comments.text: Done: prompt-first create flow, auto title via Codex when title empty, autofocus prompt field.

title: rendering the projects page shows 2 scrollbars, 1 of them fully unnecessary. i want each swim lane to scroll independently and i want the scroll to be floating and very thin and subtle (without gutter, hides when not hovering that swimlane)

comments.author: madda
comments.text: Done: shell scroll removed; each swimlane scrolls independently with thin hover-only scrollbar.

title: make double clicking on a tab again take us out of focus mode
description: and add a button on the top right of the tabs bar to leave focus mode when it's currently applied for a project

comments.author: madda
comments.text: Done: double-clicking a focused native tab exits focus mode; titlebar shows Exit focus when active.

title: Project Ticket Deletion
description: add ability to delete tickets in the projects view

title: bead progressing in statuses
description: we should make the agents push tickets around in the statuses in the swimlanes we have. right now they all stay in todo which is wrong.

comments.author: madda
comments.text: Done: Start work sets in_progress + copies agent prompt with bd status workflow; AGENTS.md documents swimlane updates.

title: the top tabs bar of the settings modal and the list of sections need to look better when the screen is narrow

i want to add filtering and full text search above the swimlanes for all the tickets in the projects panel

implement simpler version of linear's version of this feature

comments.author: madda
comments.text: Done: search + status filter bar above swimlanes (Fuse-backed).

title: when i paste long unbroken text in the ticket creation modal it overlows out and breaks the modal look

comments.author: madda
comments.text: Done: ticket textareas use overflow-wrap/word-break so long unbroken paste stays inside the modal.

title: need to add image previews to the projects area (when i paste an image add it small)

comments.author: madda
comments.text: Done: pasted images embed as small markdown previews in ticket prompt.

title: i want to be able to set priorities and tshirt sizes for the tickets in a dropdown when creating/editing them

comments.author: madda
comments.text: Done: priority + t-shirt (estimate) dropdowns on create/edit.

title: when im on code/git/project view and the companion sidebar is closed and i click on a session in the sidebar then please switch to agents view and focus on that sessions tab in the workarea

comments.author: madda

comments.author: madda
comments.text: Done: lane/card padding and min-width fixes stop cards clipping on the right.

title: do cmd + enter to save ticket in the project ticket creation modal

comments.text: Done: Cmd+Enter saves create/edit ticket dialogs.
